free_text: Experimental and theoretical study of the yields of
radionuclides produced in Th-232 thin targets
LAHET, CEM95, CEM2K, CASCADE, INUCL and YIELDX
The experimental errors are within approx.
6-35%.  The errors in the independent and cumulative
yields of the reaction products for separate
gamma-lines,were determined using the error transfer
formulas.  The uncertainties in the nuclear
data - absolute values of gamma-abundances and monitor
reaction cross section were found in the relevant
analysis to make the major contribution to the total
-By compiler. If a nucleus has isomer state, but data
heading  "ISOMER" contains space only, production cross
section includes isomer state production too.
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
- By author. Cumulative cross section is usual sum of
a nuclide independent cross section and cumulative
Production cross sections for At-209, At-208, At-206,
